introSection: Dive Coaster (Chinese: 垂直过山车) is a steel roller coaster located at Chimelong Paradise in Panyu, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China. It was built by Bolliger & Mabillard.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened on 21 January 2008.

The ride began disassembly in late 2025 and will reopen elsewhere in the park in 2026.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The layout is similar to that of SheiKra at Busch Gardens Tampa. The track is painted red and the supports are painted yellow.

fullText:
Dive Coaster (Chinese: 垂直过山车) is a steel roller coaster located at Chimelong Paradise in Panyu, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China. It was built by Bolliger & Mabillard.

The ride opened on 21 January 2008.

The ride began disassembly in late 2025 and will reopen elsewhere in the park in 2026.

The layout is similar to that of SheiKra at Busch Gardens Tampa. The track is painted red and the supports are painted yellow.
